predecessor.lost_artifacts: All training progress in /workspace/pact/lane_q_faithful_results/ — no archive harvested

torch_pin_decision.rationale: Driver 580 IS cu13-compatible BUT cu124 is the proven path on prior 4090 dispatch (Hotz vote in council). cu13-native FP4 speedup on H100 deferred to next iteration to avoid wheel-resolution surprises during emergency redeploy.

bootstrap_fixes_required: apt-get install -y unzip (missing from pytorch image)
Verify torch.cuda.is_available() == True BEFORE training (CLAUDE.md non-negotiable)
harvest_trigger: When train.log shows 'LANE_Q_FAITHFUL_DONE' OR auth_eval.log appears, scp archive_lane_q_faithful.zip + auth_eval.log + eval_work/result.json
council_verdict: 7/7 ENDORSE H100 swap (Shannon: wallclock-bound on Phase 2 KL distill; Dykstra: feasibility region intersection unaffected by chip; Yousfi: KL distill T=2.0 unchanged; Fridrich: arch unchanged; Contrarian: 4090 preemption FORCES new chip choice; Quantizr: H100 SXM is what real labs use; Hotz: 13h saved at $5 incremental cost is the ROI no-brainer)
